cards.title: Websites & Landing Pages
cards.problem: You need a polished site that loads instantly and converts
cards.solution: Next.js with on-brand design, responsive layouts, SEO, analytics, CMS

cards.title: AI Agents & Automation
cards.problem: Manual processes requiring constant team involvement
cards.solution: Building AI agents and automated pipelines
cards.result: Reduce operational costs by up to 60%

cards.title: Architecture & High-Load
cards.problem: A monolith that won't scale with growth
cards.solution: Designing microservice architecture with DDD and event-driven

cards.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
cards.solution: Setting up CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes environments
